title: [Q] How to lock the first line only? 如何只锁定标题行？
author: brooot

comments.author: nick4333
comments.body:
To freeze the first line you need to access the views property on the sheet and have it equal this object
`
{
  state: "frozen", xSplit: 0, ySplit: 1
}
`

This will keep the first row frozen while the rest of the rows can freely move. To change how many rows are frozen you need to increase the `ySplit` property. To include columns you want frozen, increase the `xSplit` property.
